# Copilot Instructions for annafogele

This is a tiny static portfolio site. When contributing or generating code, keep in mind:

## Big picture

- **Static HTML/CSS only.** There is no JavaScript, build system, package manager, or server code.
- All content lives in the repository root:
  - `index.html` is the only existing page. Links to `about.html` and `contact.html` are placeholders; those pages do not yet exist.
  - `style.css` contains the global styles and a simple reset. It’s loaded from the `<head>` of each page.
  - Images are stored under `bildes/` with subfolders (`elza`, `prakse`, `test` etc.). New images should be added there.
- The HTML is heavily commented in Latvian for educational purposes; the comments explain tags and attributes. Copilot should preserve or mimic that style when editing or adding markup.
- The layout is simple: a `<header>` with `<nav>` and site title, a `<main>` with two sections (`.hero` and `.portfolio`), and a `<footer>`. CSS classes follow a descriptive pattern (e.g. `.project-card`, `.card1`, `.hero`, `.gallery`).

## Developer workflows

- There are **no build or test commands**. To preview changes, open `index.html` (or the new page) in a browser directly.
- Editing is done by hand; Copilot assists by writing HTML snippets or CSS rules.
- When adding new pages (e.g. `about.html`, `contact.html`), copy the structure of `index.html` and update the `<main>` content. Ensure the `<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">` line remains present.
- The only external dependency is Google Fonts. URLs are hard‑coded in `<head>` and via `@import` in the inline `<style>` block.

## CSS conventions

- The first rule is a reset (`* {margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box;}`).
- Sections are separated by large comment blocks (`/* ===== HEADER ===== */`). Follow this when you add new sections.
- Font classes such as `.rubik-<uniquifier>` or `.coral-pixels-regular` are generated by the Google Fonts embed; don’t modify them manually.
- Use semantic class names and add modifier classes for color variants (`.card1`, `.card2`, `.card3`).
- Layout is mostly Flexbox; look at `nav`, `.gallery`, and other examples when adding new components.

## Project‑specific patterns

- Attributes and comments are written in Latvian; maintain the same language for new comments or instructions.
- The HTML currently uses inline `<style>` only to load a second font and override the `header nav h1` style. Prefer external CSS over inline styles unless replicating the existing pattern.
- Placeholder elements like `<div class="img-placeholder"></div>` are used where images will later be inserted.
- Navigation links use relative paths (`href="index.html"`, `about.html`, etc.) and should remain relative.

## Integration points & external services

- Google Fonts API (`fonts.googleapis.com` and `fonts.gstatic.com`) is the only external service. No other third‑party scripts or APIs are used.

## Tips for Copilot agents

1. **Don’t introduce tooling or dependencies.** Suggestions should stay within plain HTML/CSS.
2. **Respect the simple file structure.** Do not create folders or files outside the existing pattern unless explicitly requested by the user.
3. **Follow existing style comments.** When expanding CSS or HTML, mimic the comment style to keep the educational tone.
4. **Avoid JavaScript.** If the user asks for interactivity, suggest a minimal solution or indicate that the project is intended to remain static.
5. **Image paths:** New projects/images go under `bildes/`; reference them with relative paths in `<img>` tags or CSS backgrounds.

---

If you think any section here is unclear or missing important project details, ask the user for clarification.
